architecture.status: Complete Draft (document edit complete; implementation evidence pending; not ratified)

requirements.summary: Recursive AllOf, AnyOf, and Not Constraint expressions preserve satisfied, unsatisfied, and indeterminate outcomes, and any unrecognised atom poisons the complete expression.
A Capability carrying an indeterminate composite Constraint is denied before effects and records a deterministic, non-sensitive decision.
Selection excludes a candidate whose Definition Constraint is indeterminate and explains the unsupported atom using a deterministic diagnostic category.
Typed member identities use the unambiguous [AuthorityPath:]ConceptPath#MemberKind.MemberName grammar, remain distinct from concept identities, and keep versions outside canonical identity.
An Attribute-constrained binding resolves once, records immutable effective values and provenance, and restores without reselection or automatic rebinding.
A Router exposes its own logical-endpoint guarantees and refuses configurations that cannot uphold them across declared backings and fallback behavior.
Dataset identity belongs to the Dataset record and remains distinct from Store content, with Corpus-declared identity-bearing Store roles.
Dataset creation is attributable authorised issuance, Dataset and Store operations are Capability-governed, and every Corpus declares concurrent-access semantics.
Implementation documentation classifies Enrichment, Composition, and Persistent Information as work in progress outside Base and routes them to their companion design notes.
Implementation documentation and evidence preserve separate minting, custody, and target-side evaluation responsibilities without inventing a universal authority service.
The implementation risk ledger records Selection, Distribution, and Arbitration obligations without introducing a normative Mediator participant or conformance claim.
